title: Damn Zombies
description:
PURE OLD-SCHOOL MULTIPLAYER ACTIONNo extraction points, no permanent loss, no complicated rules. Just pure, unadulterated arena shooter chaos. Drop into a brutal, fast-paced Deathmatch where your only objective is to out-frag the competition. Hear the gunfire, trust your reflexes, and stay on the move.

THE CONTAINER MAZEThe entire battlefield is a tight, labyrinth-like industrial facility packed with shipping containers. With long sightlines blocked and vertical flanking routes open, combat is close-quarters, unpredictable, and relentless. Check your corners, listen for footsteps, and use the environment to ambush your foes.

CHOOSE YOUR CLASS & LOADOUTPick your role before spawning into the meat grinder. Dominate the tight corridors as a heavy Stormtrooper with a shotgun, coordinate tactical pushes as an Officer, or hold down the central lanes as a Sniper. Every class comes with unique period-accurate weapons and secondary gear to swing the tide of battle.

NON-STOP RESPAWNSDying is just a temporary setback. With instant respawns, you are thrown right back into the action within seconds. Learn the map layout, master the weapon recoil, and keep your killstreak alive.

KEY FEATURES:• Classic Deathmatch & TDM Modes: Pure arena gameplay focused entirely on shooting skills and map control.

• Claustrophobic Map Design: A tactical maze of containers creating endless close-quarters combat scenarios.

• Instant Action: No waiting around—instant respawns keep the adrenaline pumping non-stop.
description_short: Dive into fast-paced, old-school multiplayer arena combat! Battle it out in a tight, claustrophobic maze of industrial shipping containers where danger lurks around every corner. Choose your class, lock and load your arsenal, and rack up frags in non-stop, adrenaline-fueled Deathmatch action.
